programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Charlotte is a woman with anger management issues whose therapist suggests she write a journal to keep her emotions in check. Unlucky in love, she ventures online to find a boyfriend. Just as she reaches her limit of unsuccessful dates, Charlotte meets her soul mate Lyle. Everything is perfect until Lyle finds Charlottes journal and sets out to prove just how deeply he loves her.

programme.title: Camino
programme.desc: Set in 1985, war photographer Avery Taggert (Zoë Bell) has built a solid career with her stark and honest imagery, all the while remaining emotionally distant from her subjects. When she embeds in the jungles of Colombia with a squad of missionaries led by a beloved and charismatic Spaniard known as "El Guero" (Nacho Vigalondo), she finds herself in the middle of a conflict as violent as any shes photographed. One night, she happens upon El Guero committing a heinous atrocity, capturing the vile act on film, an image with the potential to discredit and destroy El Guero. Knowing this brilliant psychopath will employ every tactic at his disposal to destroy that photograph - and the photographer who took it - Avery flees into the harsh jungle with nothing but the camera hanging around her neck to escape from missionaries twisted into violent guerrillas by the madman intent on destroying all enemies.

programme.title: Existenz
programme.desc: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

programme.title: Miss Nobody
programme.desc: Unlucky in love, living at home with her eccentric mom, and stuck in a dead end secretarial job at Judge Pharmaceuticals, Sarah Jane longs for more out of life. Her surprise promotion to junior executive appears to be just the ticket. But with promotion comes a competitive new world of wily, complicated executives, and Sarah Jane begins to eliminate the competition the only way she knows how - murder. During her climb to the top, she unexpectedly falls for the man of her dreams, Detective Bill Malloy - the cop intent on cracking the case of the mysterious deaths at Judge Pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A discount store clerk strikes up an affair with a stock boy who considers himself the incarnation of Holden Caulfield.Justine is a sullen 30-year-old woman stuck in a dead-end job at the Retail Rodeo department store.In addition to her mind-numbing occupation, Justine also has to contend with her dim-witted husband, Phil, and his partner, Bubba, who work as house painters when they arent smoking pot and staring blankly at the television.Justine sees an opportunity for change, however, when she meets Holden, a fellow Retail Rodeo employee who is even more depressed than herself.The young Holden and Justine soon begin a passionate secret affair, unaware that it may not be so secret after all.

programme.title: Talea
programme.desc: Summertime. Everybody is excited to go on vacation to Italy. Everybody but Jasmin. Jasmin is yearning something. She wants to be with Eva, her mother, from whom she had to live seperately for a long time. For weeks, Jasmin is trying to get close to Eva. She does not give up, even if shes rejected. After an argument, Jasmin runs away from her fosterhome and convinces Eva to leave the city together and go on a trip. The two get closer -- sometimes as friends, sometimes as mother and daughter. A first joint cigarette, a dance in the village disco, wanderings through the woods. But expectations and needs of the girl and her mother are diverging repeatedly, especially when a man attracts Evas attention and disturbs the growing closeness between mother and daughter.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: A distant, slightly dysfunctional family is brought closer together when the fathers long-estranged Uncle Nino comes from Italy to Chicago for a surprise visit.

programme.title: Raspberry Magic
programme.desc: "Raspberry Magic" is a coming-of-age story about 11-year-old Monica Shah, who thinks she must win the science fair in order to bring her father back after he runs out on the family. She blames herself for her parents problems, and takes charge when her mother falls into a deep depression. Set behind the backdrop of a beautiful forest, Monicas experiment uses touch therapy to help raspberries grow faster. She asks, is it nature or nurture that can truly help a being grow? Does it even matter? Through her ups and downs with her family, she learns that its a complex question, and the answer isnt so simple.

programme.title: Scout Camp
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old York Hayes, leader of the Fire Dragon Scout Troops, returns to Camp Rahuta for his final scout camp. York has decided to take the best step of his life.

programme.title: Owd Bob
programme.desc: The story of a young orphaned boy who is sent to live with his grandfather in Ireland. The boy finds adjusting to the country life challenging, but soon learns the life has its rewards as well.

programme.title: Guido Superstar: The Rise of Guido
programme.desc: An Italian immigrant is thrust into the world of drug-lords, supercars and secret agents in this hilarious action comedy. After losing his job at the Disco Valet Company for undue heroism, Guido (Silvio Pollio) must pose as a Sicilian gangster for the FBI in order to infiltrate a powerful Asian gang. Things go sour and take a turn for the worse. Guido must now make amends before he is discovered and killed, or worse, deported.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: Epic look at Julius Caesar, Romes last dictator, whose death also signaled the end of the Roman Republic. Chronicles his campaigns in Gaul and Egypt, his rivalry with General Pompey, and his eventual assassination at the hands of Brutus and Cassius.

programme.title: The Magnificent Ambersons
programme.desc: The spoiled rotten and utterly unlikable rich kid George Amberson becomes horrified when his recently widowed mother rekindles her relationship with the wealthy Eugene Morgan, who she left decades earlier in order to marry Georges father. As George struggles to sabotage his mothers new romance, he must deal with his own romantic feelings for Morgans daughter and the consequences of his meddling as his once great family falls into ruin due to his machinations...

programme.title: Cookies Fortune
programme.desc: Cookies Fortune unfolds over an eventful Easter weekend in the small town of Holly Springs, Mississippi. The town residents are peaceful, kind folk--with the exception of Camille Dixon (Glenn Close) - a pushy theatre director with an incredibly shy younger sister, Cora (Julianne Moore), whose estranged daughter Emma (Liv Tyler) has just returned to town. On the heels of her latest play, Camille is shocked to discover that her Aunt Jewel Mae "Cookie" Orcutt (Patricia Neal) has committed suicide. Terrified at the thought of how this will tarnish the family name, she eats the suicide note to make it look like a burglary. This set-up leads the police to one main suspect, Willis Richland (Charles S. Dutton), who also happens to be Cookies best friend. Although the rest of the town is convinced Willis didnt commit the crime, an outside investigator (Courtney B. Vance) isnt so sure. As Easter Sunday and opening night of the play arrive, the truth comes out, revealing more secrets than anyone could have possibly imagined.

programme.title: Extract
programme.desc: Jason Bateman, Kristen Wiig, Ben Affleck and Mila Kunis star in Mike Judges workplace comedy. Joel Reynolds (Bateman) is the founder of a company that produces and bottles flavour extracts. His marital love life has flatlined, but he cant bring himself to cheat on his wife Suzie (Wiig), until his friend Dean (Affleck) convinces him to hire a gigolo to seduce her, thus freeing Joel to also play the field. This will prove to be a worse idea than it sounds. But that will be the least of his worries, as a horrific accident in the bottling plant, a grifting employee (Kunis), an aggressive lawyer (Gene Simmons) and striking workers bring his company to its knees...

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their countrys authoritarian government.

programme.title: Black Cop
programme.desc: A black police officer gets pushed to the edge after he is profiled and assaulted by the colleagues he worked side by side with, so he decides to get revenge and take his frustrations out on the community that he swore to protect.

programme.title: The Defender
programme.desc: Today - the global war on terror rages on. The United States will not give an inch against terrorists, especially Mohamed Jamar, considered to be the worst of them all. Jamar has been missing for months, but his network continues its function. The President stands firm before the world, but behind the scenes his teams are working to find the final solution. Jamar represents a paradox: he can never be killed, because if found dead he would become an instant martyr. If caught he must be tried. If he is found guilty he would become a martyr and further inspiration to acts of terror. If acquitted, the policies of the entire western world would be destroyed. So he must remain invisible. Roberta Jones, the head of the National Security Agency, is working to ensure he remains invisible, forever. Under the guise of attending an Eastern European conference on Terror in Romania, she attends a secret meeting with Jamar at a secluded hotel outside Bucharest. No one knows about this meeting and her goal is to buy his invisibility. Her only companions are her security team of six headed by her personal bodyguard, Lance Rockford. They are the best of the best, former military special forces personnel capable of anything. When they arrive at the hotel for the secret meeting they are ambushed no one is supposed to know about the meeting, but someone wants it stopped. They have to fight for their lives against an unknown attacker. Lance, a man of highest integrity with an impressive record of service for his country, is forced into a situation which challenges his very beliefs...

programme.title: Remembrance
programme.desc: Remembrance depicts a remarkable love story that blossomed amidst the terror of a German concentration camp in 1944 Poland. This impossible passion fuels the courage of a Polish prisoner who manages to rescue his Jewish girlfriend. Against all odds, they escape the camp and survive a treacherous journey to freedom. But during the chaos of the end of the war, they are forcibly separated and each is convinced that the other has died. More than thirty years later in New York, the happily married 52-year-old woman accidentally finds out that her former Polish lover is still alive. And she has to see him again.

programme.title: Unknown Energies, Unidentified Emotions
programme.desc: A hybrid of animated, experimental, feature and genre film in found footage technique, with a radio phonic sound and of unexpected, almost 40-minute duration. Journalist Isidor Dukas visits the Institute for Research on Psychic Phenomena and Mental Film when a confrontation with one of the test subjects transforms a routine check into a never-ending maze. Barićs work calls into question issues surrounding artistic practices in the digital age including ideas about authenticity, simulation/replication and appropriation.

programme.title: The Ambassador to Bern
programme.desc: Attila Szaszs political thriller portraying the events of the hostage taking of the Hungarian ambassador to Switzerland in the aftermath of the 1956 Hungarian Revolution. The film was presented at numerous festivals all over the world. It won the Frederico Fellini Award at Tiburon International Film Festival.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In 1941 China under the Japanese rule, Ma Yuan is forced to work in railroad construction used for transferring Japanese equipment. He decides together with a team of rebels to sabotage a military train with heavy weaponry.

programme.title: Mayor Cupcake
programme.desc: A hard-working cupcake maker is inadvertently elected mayor of a small town burdened with debt. With no formal experience or education to speak of, she must rely on her street smarts to clean up the town.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: Epic look at Julius Caesar, Romes last dictator, whose death also signaled the end of the Roman Republic. Chronicles his campaigns in Gaul and Egypt, his rivalry with General Pompey, and his eventual assassination at the hands of Brutus and Cassius.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Wings Of Eagles
programme.desc: The continuing true story of Eric Liddells glorious life after winning Olympic gold in the 1924 Paris Olympics. Liddell has returned to China, where he was born to missionary parents, modestly avoiding celebrity in order to teach local schoolchildren. In 1937, the Japanese invade China at the outset of WWll. Liddell with his friend Xu Niu, a street smart resistance fighter, recognize the increasing danger so Liddell sends his wife, Florence and their two daughters to safety in Canada. Duty-bound, Liddell stays to minister to the civilian victims. Liddell and other foreign nationals are taken as prisoners and placed in one of the many Japanese internment camps where they are forced to endure for two years. Before the Japanese surrender, Liddell succumbs to a brain tumor. Yet his message of hope became immortal. Eric Liddells legacy continues to this day as he remains admired as a champion for life.

programme.title: Wake
programme.desc: When things get tough for offbeat Carys Reitman, she does what any emotionally isolated, modern girl would do - she goes to strangers funerals. At one fateful funeral, she unexpectedly meets Tyler, a man mourning his fiancee. Despite the warnings of her undertaker best friend Shane and her roommate Lila, she finds herself connecting to someone for the first time. Searching for answers, Carys goes to see her estranged mother to confront her past. And as she tries to open herself to the risks of love with Tyler, she realizes she may have more to fear than just a broken heart.

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond, a money launderer struggling with memory loss sustained in a car crash, goes on the run, evading the police while carrying heaps of stolen cash he knows nothing about. Moe and his partner in crime Bobby "Skunk" Cohen had been given a job by Bobbys uncle Perico, wherein he gave them a sum of $20 million to launder. However, the two are ambushed while doing a side job by corrupt police officers. The two manage to escape the cops, but soon after end up in a car accident.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harrys pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harrys bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: Sekss un lielpilsēta
programme.desc: Kerijas Bredšovas sapnis beidzot ir piepildījies – viņa precēsies ar Lielisko vīrieti. Viņš jau reiz ir bijis laulībā, tāpēc vēlas nelielas svinības, taču Kerija, pielaikojot labāko dizaineru kāzu kleitas, ātri vien aizraujas ar domu par modes dāmas sapņu kāzām. Pēc sarunas ar Mirandu, kura būtībā runā par savas laulības problēmām, Lielisko vīrieti pārņem šaubas. Stīva un Mirandas attiecībās iestājies panīkums, tāpēc abi pārguļ ar citiem cilvēkiem un galu galā izšķiras. Kad Lieliskais vīrietis pamet Keriju pie altāra, draudzenes dodas ceļojumā, kam bija jākļūst par jaunā pāra medusmēnesi. Draudzenes ir lieliska kompānija, taču Kerija nespēj uzreiz atgūt dzīvesprieku. Samantu kaitina prombūtne no arvien nevaļīgākā Smita, kura aktiera karjera uzņem apgriezienus, tāpēc viņa izseko glīto jaunekli. Valentīna dienā Miranda atzīstas Kerijai, ka ir vainojama Lieliskā vīrieša bēgšanā. Rezultātā Kerija izlīgst ar savu mīļoto, un abi salaulājas miertiesneša kabinetā.

programme.title: Matriks. Revolūcija
programme.desc: Trešajā - noslēdzošajā Matriksa triloģijas daļā, karš starp Mašīnu armiju un Cionas iedzīvotājiem ir sasniedzis kulmināciju. Neo un Trīsvienība dodas uz vietu, kur neviens cilvēks nav uzdrīkstējies spert kāju - tālu prom no izpostītās zemes, uz Mašīnu pilsētu.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Saulriets un zveja.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Sekss un lielpilsēta
programme.desc: Kerijas Bredšovas sapnis beidzot ir piepildījies – viņa precēsies ar Lielisko vīrieti. Viņš jau reiz ir bijis laulībā, tāpēc vēlas nelielas svinības, taču Kerija, pielaikojot labāko dizaineru kāzu kleitas, ātri vien aizraujas ar domu par modes dāmas sapņu kāzām. Pēc sarunas ar Mirandu, kura būtībā runā par savas laulības problēmām, Lielisko vīrieti pārņem šaubas. Stīva un Mirandas attiecībās iestājies panīkums, tāpēc abi pārguļ ar citiem cilvēkiem un galu galā izšķiras. Kad Lieliskais vīrietis pamet Keriju pie altāra, draudzenes dodas ceļojumā, kam bija jākļūst par jaunā pāra medusmēnesi. Draudzenes ir lieliska kompānija, taču Kerija nespēj uzreiz atgūt dzīvesprieku. Samantu kaitina prombūtne no arvien nevaļīgākā Smita, kura aktiera karjera uzņem apgriezienus, tāpēc viņa izseko glīto jaunekli. Valentīna dienā Miranda atzīstas Kerijai, ka ir vainojama Lieliskā vīrieša bēgšanā. Rezultātā Kerija izlīgst ar savu mīļoto, un abi salaulājas miertiesneša kabinetā.

programme.title: Karstā čiksa
programme.desc: Glītā, atjautīgā un pārgalvīgā Džesika allaž gatava kādu izjokot, var izkāpt pa otrā stāva logu, lai slepeni no vecākiem satiktu mīļoto Billiju, pēc randiņa tāpat vienkārši uzkāpt kokā, lai pa logu tiktu atpakaļ… Šī pati gaišmatainā smaidīgā būtne kādu rītu pamostas… Kā vīrietis ap trīsdesmit, kas izlien no gultas Džesikas naktskreklā. Joks? Kāds joks, ja viņa pati savām acīm to visu redz. Spogulis rāda bārdas rugājiem apaugušu seju. Kā dzīvot tālāk? Un Džesika pat nenojauš, ka viņa tagad dzīvo sīkā blēža Klaiva Mekstona ādā… Pārpratumu bez gala, divdomīgu situāciju vēl vairāk… Galvenajās lomās: Reičela Makadamsa, Robs Šnaiders, Anna Ferisa.

programme.title: Matriks. Revolūcija
programme.desc: Trešajā - noslēdzošajā Matriksa triloģijas daļā, karš starp Mašīnu armiju un Cionas iedzīvotājiem ir sasniedzis kulmināciju. Neo un Trīsvienība dodas uz vietu, kur neviens cilvēks nav uzdrīkstējies spert kāju - tālu prom no izpostītās zemes, uz Mašīnu pilsētu.

Joks? Kāds joks, ja viņa pati savām acīm to visu redz. Spogulis rāda bārdas rugājiem apaugušu seju. Kā dzīvot tālāk? Un Džesika pat nenojauš, ka viņa tagad dzīvo sīkā blēža Klaiva Mekstona ādā… Pārpratumu bez gala, divdomīgu situāciju vēl vairāk… Galvenajās lomās: Reičela Makadamsa, Robs Šnaiders, Anna Ferisa.

programme.title: Bezmiegs Sietlā
programme.desc: Nesen par atraitni kļuvuša vīrieša dēls piezvana uz radio sarunu šovu, mēģinot savam tēvam atrast jaunu partneri.

programme.title: Rītdienas karš
programme.desc: Pasaules kausa izcīņas fināla spēle futbolā tiek pārtraukta, jo laukumā uzrodas karavīri no nākotnes - 2051. gada. Viņi paziņo, ka nākotnē cīnās par cilvēces izdzīvošanu ar citplanētiešiem, un viņiem nepieciešami papildspēki, citādi šī cīņa tiks zaudēta. Palīgā karavīriem, lai cīnītos par savas meitas nākotni, dodas arī bioloģijas skolotājs Dens Foresters. Vai viņiem izdosies, vai Dens atgriezīsies tagadnē sveiks un vesels? Galvenajās lomās: Kriss Prats, Ivonna Strahovski, Dž. K. Simonss

programme.title: Vecāks par 21 gadu
programme.desc: Džefs ir paraugstudents, kurš līdz šim visu darījis pareizi un mācījies cītīgi. Taču viņa divdesmit pirmā dzimšanas diena iekritusi tieši pirms iestājeksāmieniem medicīnas skolā, un viņa divi labākie draugi uzaicina Džefu iedzert alu. Kad Džefs pārmaiņas pēc nolemj šajā dienā beidzot darīt visu, ko vien viņam iegribas, ieplānotais mierīgais vakars izvēršas par īstu elli, kur neviens no iesaistītajiem nespēs aizmirst vēl ilgi.

programme.title: Asfalta pilsēta
programme.desc: Ollijs Kross ir jauns feldšeris, kurš strādā Ņujorkas nakts maiņā kopā ar pieredzējušu un nelokāmu partneri Džīnu Rutkovski. Katrs 911 izsaukums bieži ir bīstams un neparedzams, ik dienu liekot viņu dzīvības uz spēles, lai palīdzētu citiem.

programme.title: Ananasu ekspresis
programme.desc: Deils ir slaists, kurš laiku pa regulāri iegriežas pie Saula - sava narkotiku dīlera. Viņiem nav nekā kopīga, izņemot interesi par jaunām zālītes šķirnēm. Kad Deils kļūst par slepkavības liecinieku un notikuma vietā pamet aizsmēķētu kāsi, viņam uz pēdām nonāk sliktie puiši, un nu briesmās ir arī Sauls. Abi ņem kājas pār pleciem, un, bezmērķīgi bēguļojot, iekuļas vienās vienīgās nepatikšanās.

programme.title: Aplaupīt 30 minūtēs
programme.desc: Niks ir picu piegādātājs, kura dzīve sagriežas kājām gaidā brīdī, kad divi viltīgi bandīti saņem viņu gūstā, piestiprina viņam spridzekli un uzdod aplaupīt banku. Tieši dienā, kad viņš sastrīdējies ar savu labāko draugu.

programme.title: Asfalta pilsēta

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Meitene miglā
programme.desc: Krimināltrilleris, Francija, Vācija, Itālija, 2017. / Režisors: Donato Karīzi / Lomās: Tonijs Servilo, Žans Reno, Alesio Boni, Galateja Ranci. Kādā aukstā ziemas naktī psihiatru Augusto Floresu steidzami izsauc uz darbu, lai izmeklētu avārijā nonākušo policijas inspektoru Fogelu. Inspektors neko neatceras, notikuma vietā nekas nenorāda uz avārijas iemeslu un tās upuriem. Tomēr Fogela krekls ir ar svaigiem asins traipiem un asinis nav viņa. Sarunas laikā sāk izgaismoties neticamu, pirms mēneša sākušos, notikumu virkne.

programme.title: Labākais manī
programme.desc: Lai gan Amanda un Davsons nāk no dažādiem sociālajiem slāņiem, viņu mīlasstāsts, kurš sācies jau pusaudžu vecumā, ir pierādījums tam, ka dvēseļu radinieki eksistē. Kāds negadījums jauniešus izšķir. Paiet teju 20 gadi, kad nejaušība viņus atkal saved kopā. Amanda ir nelaimīgi precējusies un sirds dziļumos joprojām nespēj piedot Davsonam, ka viņš no viņas reiz atteicies, tomēr skaidrs ir viens - intensīvās jūtas, kas piedzīvotas jaunībā, nav mazinājušās, bet tikai pieņēmušās spēkā. Vai dvēseles radiniekiem liktenis lēmis būt kopā?

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Mis Saulstariņš
programme.desc: Uz ekrāniem filma par vienu visdīvainākajām ģimenēm kino vēsturē - Hūveriem. Lai piepildītu jaunākās meitas Olivas sapni piedalīties skaistuma un talantu konkursā, viņi dodas ceļā uz Kaliforniju.

programme.title: Mis Saulstariņš
programme.desc: Uz ekrāniem filma par vienu visdīvainākajām ģimenēm kino vēsturē - Hūveriem. Lai piepildītu jaunākās meitas Olivas sapni piedalīties skaistuma un talantu konkursā, viņi dodas ceļā uz Kaliforniju.

programme.title: Nebraska
programme.desc: Vecais kara veterāns Vudijs ir saņēmis vēstuli, ka ir laimējis miljonu dolāru. Viņš vairākkārt aizlavās no mājām un apņēmīgi soļo uz Linkolnu, kas atrodas tūkstošiem kilometru attālumā, lai to saņemtu, bet vienmēr tiek apturēts. Dēls Deivids apžēlojas un ved viņu ar auto. Pa ceļam, satiekot cilvēkus no viņa pagātnes, atklājas patiesais Vudija dzīvesstāsts, mīlas attiecības, kara traumas, neveiksmes biznesā. Mazliet jautrā un arī skumjā melnā komēdija uzņemta melnbaltās krāsās un ir nominēta Oskaram sešās kategorijās, kā arī ieguvusi daudzus prestižus kino apbalvojumus.

programme.title: Rītdienas cilvēks
programme.desc: Eds Hemslers savu dzīvi pavada, gatavojoties katastrofai, kas varētu nepienākt. Ronija Meisnere savu dzīvi veltījusi, pērkot lietas, kuras visdrīzāk nekad neizmantos. Šie divi cilvēki mēģinās atrast mīlestību.

programme.title: Midltonā
programme.desc: Divi vecāki vien vienas dienas laikā viens otrā iemīlas, neatļauti nepiedaloties viņu bērnu skolas tūrē.

programme.title: Beibes
programme.desc: Mūža draudzenes Edena un Dona - viena neprecējusies un vēlas bērnu, otra jau māte - pārvar viņu saikni saraujošus izaicinājumus: Edena pēc vienas nakts sakara vienatnē vēlas ieņemt bērnu.

programme.title: Neticamais stāsts par Bendžaminu Batonu
programme.desc: Trīspadsmit "Oskariem" nominētās filmas pamatā ir F. Skota Ficdžeralda stāsts par Bendžaminu Batonu, kurš piedzimis sirmā vecumā un ar katru gadu paliek aizvien jaunāks. Viņam svarīgie cilvēki, sekojot dabiskajam ritmam, noveco un mirst, bet Bendžamins kļūst arvien jaunāks un jaunāks. Neparastie notikumi aizsākas Pirmā pasaules kara beigās, Ņūorleānā un sniedzas līdz 21. gadsimtam. Galvenajās lomās: Breds Pits, Tilda Svintone, Keita Blanšeta u.c.

programme.title: Piedošana
programme.desc: Ir svelmaina 1935. gada Anglijas vasara. Kāda turīga ģimene pulcējas savā muižā, lai pavadītu laiskas brīvdienas. Gaisā virmo nojautas par gaidāmo Otro pasaules karu, kas atstās nedzēšamas pēdas cilvēku dzīvē. Galveno varoņu Sesīlijas Talisas un Robija Tērnera likteni traģiskā virpulī sagriež Sesīlijas jaunākās māsas Brionijas netaisni celtā apsūdzība, vainojot Robiju par noziegumu, kuru viņš nav pastrādājis. Aizkustinošs stāsts par mīlestību, kaislību, nodevību un piedošanu Filma saņēmusi septiņas Amerikas Kinoakadēmijas balvas nominācijas un septiņas "Zelta globusa" nominācijas, kā arī Amerikas Kinoakadēmijas balvu kategorijā "Labākā oriģinālmūzika". Filma uzņemta pēc Īana Makjūena romāna "Piedošana" motīviem.

programme.title: Beibes
programme.desc: Mūža draudzenes Edena un Dona - viena neprecējusies un vēlas bērnu, otra jau māte - pārvar viņu saikni saraujošus izaicinājumus: Edena pēc vienas nakts sakara vienatnē vēlas ieņemt bērnu.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri grabs seconds of smoked bacon meatloaf in Atlanta, competition-style barbecue in Scottsdale, AZ, and a next-level burger in Fort Worth, TX.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and host Eric Adjepong welcome three aspiring shellfish experts and watch them cook up a storm, as they go through two rounds of cooking. The hosts select their favourite contestant and dish, after which they discuss the judges comments.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps host as pairs of professional bakers create spellbinding edible showpieces on the actual Harry Potter film sets. Guest actors from the films share behind-the-scenes experiences as they join judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to over-the-top arepas in Norwalk, CT, island-inspired chicken wings in Mesa, AZ, and killer kebabs in Dallas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri grabs seconds of smoked bacon meatloaf in Atlanta, competition-style barbecue in Scottsdale, AZ, and a next-level burger in Fort Worth, TX.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and host Eric Adjepong welcome three aspiring shellfish experts and watch them cook up a storm, as they go through two rounds of cooking. The hosts select their favourite contestant and dish, after which they discuss the judges comments.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay V. Symon
programme.desc: Join our hosts, renowned celebrity chefs and restaurateurs Bobby Flay and Michael Symon, as they test the skills of eight expert barbecue connoisseurs. Filmed at the Star Hill Ranch in Austin, Texas, the eight chefs are divided into two teams but, in order to claim first pick for their team, Bobby and Michael go head-to-head in a backyard BBQ challenge. Each episode sees one of the chefs being eliminated from the show until there is only one left, the winner who is awarded the title of Master of Cue. The weekly contests aim to reveal the chefs talents and expose their weaknesses and include tasks such as cooking up a tomahawk rib-eye and taking on a Texas beef challenge.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Battle Of the Decades
programme.desc: In this all-new series, teams comprised of two chefs from different generations will tackle challenges in which they must mesh retro ingredients with todays viral food trends to bridge the culinary gap and show off their expertise.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps host as pairs of professional bakers create spellbinding edible showpieces on the actual Harry Potter film sets. Guest actors from the films share behind-the-scenes experiences as they join judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking
programme.desc: James and Oliver Phelps host as pairs of professional bakers create spellbinding edible showpieces on the actual Harry Potter film sets. Guest actors from the films share behind-the-scenes experiences as they join judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: One summer in Ukraine
programme.desc: From training grounds to the anticipation of a big fight: the journey of the Ronin volunteers Team in the International Legion of the GUR. The film shows the other side of the training of foreign fighters, where grueling service and strict selection weed out the weak. Against the background of alarming news about the enemys advance, yesterdays comrades are preparing for a real test of courage, where not only friendship, but also life is at stake .

programme.title: Nelikumība
programme.desc: Patiess stāsts par nelāgas slavas apvītajiem Bondurānu brāļiem – trim kukurūzas kandžas dzinējiem, kuri cenšas sasniegt amerikāņu sapni laikā, kad valda sausais likums. Virdžīnijā, Frenklinas apgabala kalnos, pārdzīvojuši karu, Bondurānu brāļi ar ieročiem cīnās par savu biznesu un ģimenes cieņu un kļūst par vietējo leģendu. Kamēr jaunākais brālis Džeks met acis uz skaisto Bertu, vienmēr drūmais vidējais brālis Forests visus tur aizdomās par krāpšanu, vecākajam – Hovardam – nākas risināt riskantā ģimenes biznesa problēmas. Laiki nav no vieglajiem, un štatā valda bezdarbs, taču Bondurāni ir uzņēmēji, kas aizsākuši plaukstošu vietējo biznesu, dzenot stipru un iecienītu sīvo, kas iesaukts par "mēnesnīcu". Taču kandžas dzinēju labās dienas Frenklinas apgabalā iet uz galu, jo pilsētā no Čikāgas ieradies specaģents Čārlijs Reiks. Jaunais "likums", ko pūlas iedibināt Reiks, nes nāvi un veicina korupciju. Tas rada šķēršļus brāļu iecerēm un ideāliem. Tomēr Bondurāni ir apņēmušies nelocīt ceļus neviena priekšā.

programme.title: Zaļknābis pie stūres
programme.desc: Viņš ir ļoti jauns un prot ļoti ātri un labi braukt, kad jātiek prom no nozieguma vietas. Tas ir neviens cits kā labākais auto vadītājs, saukts par Mazo. Kad Mazais satiek savu sapņu meiteni, viņš vēlas pamest noziedzīgo pasauli. Taču tas nav tik vienkārši, kā šķiet, kad Mazais tiek iesaistīts vēl vienā noziegumā, kas apdraud viņa dzīvi, mīlestību un brīvību.

programme.title: Melnais lācis
programme.desc: Radošu krīzi piedzīvojoša filmu veidotāja meklē vienatni kādā lauku retrītā, taču saprot, ka mežs tikai piešķir spēku viņas iekšējiem dēmoniem.

programme.title: Pasakainais četrinieks
programme.desc: Filma vēsta par divām draudzenēm, kuras dodas ceļojumā, lai būtu līgavas māsas savai koledžas draudzenei pārsteiguma kāzās.

programme.title: Blūmu ģimenes stāsts
programme.desc: Sema ir aktīvā dzīvesveida piekritēja, taču ģimenes ceļojumā pa Taizemi notiek nelaime – viņa neveiksmīgi nokrīt no balkona, savaino mugurkaulu un paliek daļēji paralizēta. Semas vīrs, trīs dēli un māte visādi mēģina palīdzēt un uzmundrināt sievieti, kura ir zaudējusi dzīvesprieku un slīgst arvien dziļāk depresīvā noskaņojumā. Pēkšņi mājas pagalmā uzrodas ievainots žagatas mazulis, kuru ģimene adoptē un nosauc par Pingvīnu. Neviens gan nebija iedomājies, ka tieši Pingvīns būs tas, kurš palīdzēs Semai atkal saskatīt dzīvei jēgu un atgūt optimismu.

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Madagaskaras pingvīni
programme.desc: Bezbailīgie pingvīni Kapteinis, Kovalskis, Riko un Ierindnieks, kuri ir labākie spiegi, kādi jebkad izšķīlušies no olas, apvieno spēkus ar smalku slepeno organizāciju "Ziemeļvējš". Izskatīgā un brašā aģenta Slepenā vadībā viņiem kopā jāaptur ļaunais doktors Oktāvijs Brīze, kurš ir nodomājis iznīcināt pasauli.

programme.title: Maja Ma
programme.desc: Pallavi Patela ir indiešu vidusmēra ģimenes sieva, pazīstama ar savu dejotprasmi un kulinārijas mākslu. Dēla Teja saderināšanās vakars draud izgāzties, jo paklīdušas tenkas par priekšzīmīgo mājsaimnieci Pallavi.

programme.title: Zeks un Vovo: Leģendāra leģenda
programme.desc: Iedomu pasaules sirdī, kurā mīt fantastiskas būtnes un bīstami briesmoņi, 13 gadus vecais Zaks dodas meklēt savu dvīņu brāli Kailu, kurš noslēpumaini pazudis.

programme.title: Vīrs, kurš izgudroja Ziemassvētkus
programme.desc: Stāsts par to, kā Čārlzs Dikenss uzrakstīja "Ziemassvētku stāstu", kas kļuva par īstu Ziemassvētku gara atainojumu.

programme.title: Runcis zābakos
programme.desc: Vēl pirms leģendārais Runcis Zābakos satiek mums visiem jau zināmo zaļo briesmoni, vārdā Šreks, viņš dodas varonīgiem piedzīvojumiem pilnā ceļojumā, lai kopā ar ideju meistaru Oliņu Aleksandru Boliņu un drosmīgo kaķenīti Kitiju Maigķepu nozagtu Zosi, kas dēj zelta olas. Tas tik būs viens varens un deviņu dzīvību vērts piedzīvojums!

programme.title: Amerikas maģisko melnādaino biedrība
programme.desc: Jauns vīrietis tiek uzņemts noslēpumainā biedrībā, kurā darbojas maģiski melnādainie cilvēki, kas veltī savu dzīvi augstākā mērķa īstenošanai: atvieglot baltajiem cilvēkiem dzīvi.

programme.title: Karalisks piedāvājums
programme.desc: 2010. gadā pirms Arābu pavasara izmisušam amerikāņu tirgonim Alanam (Toms Henks) pēc mājas zaudēšanas un šķiršanās no sievas dzīvē ir iestājusies krīze. Izmisīgi cenšoties atgūt atpakaļ savu sievu, viņš dodas uz Saūda Arābiju, lai valdībai pārdotu hologrāfisku telekonferences sistēmu. Cieši apņēmies noslēgt līgumu un nepalikt uz sēkļa brūkošā ekonomikā, viņš mācās, kā izturēties svešā kultūrā ar taksometra vadītāja (Aleksandrs Bleks) un vietējā ārsta palīdzību (Sarita Čodrija)

programme.title: Bildinājums
programme.desc: Ambiciozā Ņujorkas izdevniecības vadītāja Margareta ir gatavā vellata, un viņas darbinieki visi kā viens dabū no bargās priekšnieces trūkties. Īpaši smagi klājas asistentam Endrjū, kuram Margaretas dēļ nākas strādāt pat brīvdienās. Taču kādu dienu nevainojamajai Margaretas dzīvei rodas nopietns apdraudējums – uzturēšanās atļauja ASV ir beigusies un viņai draud deportācija uz dzimto Kanādu. Lai nepazaudētu prestižo darbu, viņai atliek tikai viena iespēja – likt kādam no saviem padotajiem viņu bildināt un noslēgt fiktīvas laulības. Pirmais Margaretas ceļā trāpās Endrjū.

programme.title: Lī
programme.desc: Patiesais stāsts par fotogrāfi Elizabeti "Lī" Milleri, modes modeli, kura kļuva par atzītu kara korespondenti Vogue žurnālam Otrā pasaules kara laikā.

programme.title: Krauklis
programme.desc: Dvēseles radinieki Ēriks Dravens un Šellija Vēbstere tiek nežēlīgi nogalināti. Saņemot iespēju upurēt sevi un glābt savu mūža mīlestību, Ēriks dodas ceļā, šķērsojot dzīvo un mirušo pasauli, lai atriebtos un izcīnītu taisnību.

programme.title: Neiznīcināmie
programme.desc: Bruņoti līdz zobiem, bet vai tiešām neiznīcināmi? Komanda cieš zaudējumus: Bārnijs Ross izstājas no ierindas, bet Lī Kristmasam anulē pielaidi pie turpmākajām operācijām. Vienībai pievienojas jauni kaujinieki, kuriem jāpadara iesāktais līdz galam, taču arī viņi cieš neveiksmi. Tagad Lī vienatnē nāksies iekļūt ienaidnieka midzenī un atbrīvot sagūstīto komandu, paralēli novēršot globāla mēroga katastrofu. Tikai tā ir iespējams izglābt pasauli un atjaunot Neiznīcināmo reputāciju.

programme.title: Bitīte Maija: Medus spēles
programme.desc: Strops satraukti dūc – nupat novākta vasaras medus raža. Varbūt beidzot spiets tiks izraudzīts dalībai Medus spēlēs? Maijas jaukais satraukums zūd, kad viņa uzzina, ka strops nepiedalīsies spēlēs, turklāt puse ražas būs jāatdod spēļu dalībniekiem. Maijai tas šķiet netaisnīgi. Bez stropa karalienes atļaujas viņa grasās lidot uz Zumtropoli pie imperatores un lūgt atļauju piedalīties spēlēs, pārstāvot savu stropu. Cenzdamās pierādīt stropa karalienei, ko bites spēj, Maija apsola gūt uzvaru Medus spēlēs un glābt stropa medu. Karaliene piekrīt, bet atgādina, ka, vedot komandu cīņā, Maijai vispirms jāiemācās uzklausīt citus. Maija piedalās spēlēs kopā ar labāko draugu Villiju un seno biedru vaboļu komandu. Drīz viņa sastop skaudīgo bitīti Vijolīti no Zumtropoles, kura ar viltu cenšas atņemt Maijas komandai uzvaru. Bitītei nākas piedzīvot viltus rūgtumu, taču negodīgā Vijolīte un viņas komanda arī iekuļas ķibelē.

programme.title: Trakās ķepas. Leģenda par Henku
programme.desc: Henks varbūt ir necils suns, taču viņš ir apņēmības pilns kļūt par samuraju. Suņuks dodas uz valsti, kur čum un mudž no kaķiem. Tur Henks satiek nejauko kaķu karavadoni Iku Ču un arī Džimbo, kurš reiz bijis varens samurajs. Džimbo paņem Henku savā paspārnē un iemāca viņam, ko īsti nozīmē būt samurajam. Dzimstot pirmajai īstajai draudzībai starp kaķi un suni, abiem nākas glābt Kakamučo no ļaunā Ika Ču.

programme.title: Atsitiens
programme.desc: Endrjū ir jauns un ambiciozs džeza bundzinieks, gatavs kļūt par labāko no labākajiem ASV austrumu krasta mūzikas vidusskolā, atspēriena punktā uz lielo skatuvi. Despotiskais pasniedzējs Terenss pamana Endrjū un iekļauj viņu džeza orķestra sastāvā, uz visiem laikiem izmainot jaunieša dzīvi. Endrjū vēlme kļūt par labāko drīz pārvēršas apsēstībā, un Terensa nežēlīgās mācību metodes nostāda viņu gan uz fizisko spēju, gan arī saprāta robežas. Filma saņēmusi galveno žūrijas balvu un skatītāju balvu Sandensas filmu festivālā, trīs "Oskarus" kategorijās "Labākais otrā plāna aktieris", "Labākā montāža", "Labākā skaņas apstrāde", tāpat arī trīs britu "BAFTA" balvas. Filmas režisors ir Deimiens Čazels, kurš ir ieguvis arī "Oskaru" par muzikālo drāmu "La La Land: Kalifornijas sapņi" 32 gadu vecumā, tādejādi kļūstot par jaunāko režisoru, kurš ieguvis Amerikas Kinoakadēmijas prestižo apbalvojumu.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Iepriekšējos Ziemassvētkos, dodoties brīvdienās uz Franciju, Makkalisteri aizmirsa mājās savu jaunāko atvasi Kevinu. Šogad, dodoties uz Floridu, viņi dēlu pazaudē lidostā. Kamēr ģimene lido uz Maiami, Kevins ar tēva kredītkartēm kabatā ir ceļā uz Ņujorku. Lielajā pilsētā viņš atrod jaunus draugus, iekārtojas lepnākajā viesnīcā un sastop arī savus vecos paziņas – divus aprobežotos kramplaužus. Šoreiz abi ļaundari Ziemassvētku vakarā plāno apzagt lielāko rotaļlietu veikalu Ņujorkā. Turklāt viņi jau sen alkst atriebties Kevinam – zēnam, kura dēļ nonāca cietumā.

programme.title: Sliktais ģēnijs
programme.desc: Grupa vidusskolas pēdējo klašu skolēnu no uzņēmējdarbības programmas apvienojas, lai izjauktu krāpniecisku augstskolu uzņemšanas sistēmu.

programme.title: Ugunīgi ass
programme.desc: Iedvesmojošs stāsts par Ričardu Montanezu, uzkodu ražotāja "Frito Lay" apkopēju, kurš, pateicoties savai meksikāņu izcelsmei, palīdzēja sapurināt pārtikas industriju, palīdzot radīt vienus no visu laiku populārākajiem čipsiem "Flamin Hot Cheetos".

programme.title: Ja es spētu izstāstīt
programme.desc: Denijs Svifts ir pirmās formulas sacīkšu braucējs, taču bez autosporta viņš dievina arī savu skaisto sievu, mazo meitiņu un labāko draugu suni Enzo, kurš nākamajā dzīvē vēlas pārdzimt kā cilvēks. Suņu mīļotāji allaž uzskata, ka viņu suņi ir pilntiesīgi ģimenes locekļi, kuri spēj saprast cilvēku sacīto, izprot notikumus un ir uzticami līdz savai pēdējai stundiņai. Un nudien - tieši tāds suns ir Enzo. Viņa ikdiena lielākoties aizrit, skatoties televīziju un apgūstot visu iespējamo par sava īpašnieka lielāko aizraušanos - braukšanu ar sacīkšu auto. Viņš piedzīvo gan Denija laulības, gan viņu meitas Zojas piedzimšanu. Savas spēcīgās ožas dēļ viņš ir arī pirmais, kurš saprot, ka Denija sievai attīstās smadzeņu vēzis...

programme.title: Krūdi
programme.desc: Aizvēsturiska piedzīvojumu komēdija par pasaules pirmo ģimeni, kura dodas unikālā ceļojumā, kad viņu dzimtā ala tiek iznīcināta. Ceļojot pa elpu aizraujošajām ainavām, Krūdi atklāj pasakainu, jaunu vietu, kur mīt vēl neredzētas būtnes. Viņu pasaules uztvere mainās uz visiem laikiem.

programme.title: Viņa atnāca pie manis
programme.desc: Iedvesmu pazaudējis rakstnieks no jauna atrod savu profesionālo kaislību pēc piedzīvojumiem bagāta vienas nakts sakara.

programme.title: Bubulis
programme.desc: Šausmu karaļa Stīvena Kinga darba ekranizējums: pēc mātes nāves Seidija un Sojera ļaujas sērām, kamēr abu tēvs Hārpers pūlas, lai viss atgrieztos ikdienišķās sliedēs. Kādu dienu Hārperu viņa psihoterapijas praksē apmeklē pacients un izstāsta par noslēpumaino Bubuli, kurš it kā nogalinājis viņa bērnus. Neilgi pēc tam viņš Hārperu mājā izdara pašnāvību, un drīz vien māsas sāk vajāt pārdabiska būtne.

programme.title: Vecais Henrijs
programme.desc: Kad zemnieks savā mājā uzņem ievainotu vīrieti, pie kura atrodas maiss ar naudu, viņš tiek ierauts ārpuslikuma krustugunīs. Kad lido lodes un atklājas ievainotā vīrieša identitāte, vecajam zemniekam ir jāizlemj - kuram uzticēties un pret kuru cīnīties.

programme.title: Pats varmācīgākais gads
programme.desc: 1981. gads Ņujorkā. Ambiciozs imigrants cīnās par savu uzņēmumu un ģimeni visbīstamākajā gadā šīs pilsētas vēsturē.

programme.title: Regbijs: Sešu nāciju kauss. Velsa-Skotija
programme.desc: The Six Nations Championship is an annual international mens rugby union competition between the rugby teams of England, France, Ireland, Italy, Scotland, and Wales. Its format is quite simple: each team plays every other team once making a total of 15 matches, with home ground advantage alternating from one year to the next. The current champions are England, who won the 2020 tournament.

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Bayern - Eintracht
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: EuroLeague. Zalgiris Kaunas - Olympiacos
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Barcelona - Levante
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: EuroLeague. Real Madrid - FC Bayern
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.title: ATP 500 Acapulco. Singles. 1/4 final
programme.desc: Tune into the Mexican Open tournament, a joint professional tennis competition held annually in Acapulco, Mexico. The tournament is part of the ATP Tour and features tennis players competing on outdoor hard courts. The player who is declared winner of the competition receives a silver gourd trophy and the grand cash prize.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Based in Kansas City, Tamara Day is a restoration expert who believes no home is too big for her to take on. Scouring the city for large, neglected mansions that she can buy on the cheap, she then uses her eye for design to transform these shabby houses into elegant homes. With her dad helping her on each project, they gut the decaying aspects of each house whilst keeping any characteristic and authentic features, enticing deep-pocketed buyers with open concepts and modern layouts. Using her experience from maintaining buildings on the family farm, she turns these decrepit structures into warm homes that are perfect for a family to move in and start creating memories.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Bargain Block follows home renovation experts and partners Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas on their journey to restore Detroits iconic American neighborhoods one house at a time. With sound advice and support from their friend—lifetime Detroit resident and real estate expert Shea Hicks-Whitfield, who is expecting her first child—Keith and Evan buy multiple rundown and abandoned houses on a single block, take them down to the studs, and create affordable, stylish and fully furnished starter homes that are ideal for first-time homebuyers. Now settled in the Motor City, the couple, who have renovated and purchased their own home and opened a new retail store and workshop, infuse every property with a functional layout, artful design and beautiful repurposed furniture. The end result is incredible transformations of dilapidated homes that are an inspiration to the entire neighborhood.

David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Human Genesis. Based solely on Charles Darwins Theory of Evolution, the rapid development of modern humans seems impossible without a "missing link." Could this link involve extraterrestrial intervention?

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the worlds top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into whats really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Rivaling the famous Area 51 in Nevada for UFO sightings and paramormal activity, is the lesser known, but equally fascinating, Uinta Basin in Utah and, in particular, Skinwalker Ranch. For the first time, a team of scientists and experts have been granted unlimited access to the infamous and secretive 512-acre property in order to unlock the mysteries of more than 200 years of UFO activity, bizarre animal mutations and preternatural phenomena. Making good use of state-of-the-art tecnology such as drone thermography, ground-penetrating radar and lasers, the team apply their knowledge and expertise to make shocking discoveries.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: Rivaling the famous Area 51 in Nevada for UFO sightings and paramormal activity, is the lesser known, but equally fascinating, Uinta Basin in Utah and, in particular, Skinwalker Ranch. For the first time, a team of scientists and experts have been granted unlimited access to the infamous and secretive 512-acre property in order to unlock the mysteries of more than 200 years of UFO activity, bizarre animal mutations and preternatural phenomena. Making good use of state-of-the-art tecnology such as drone thermography, ground-penetrating radar and lasers, the team apply their knowledge and expertise to make shocking discoveries.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: As we make plans to travel beyond the Moon to new worlds, how are we preparing to become human extraterrestrials? Just how will we survive this trip into the unknown? And what will we do if we make contact with intelligent life?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold and Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and theres clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. Its up to them to determine whats real and whats fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyones mind, "Whats the story behind it?" and "Whats it worth?"

programme.title: Beyond Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: When Andy and Paul head to Northern California to investigate one of Brandon Fugals most intriguing sites: the notorious energy hotspot of Mt. Shasta, they discover the outrageous lore surrounding the mountain is justified by hard data.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The worlds most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.
